summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Glimmer Quest Match-3 game. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI loads correctly with all major features functional. Critical modal overlay bug found preventing full game interaction testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events preventing clicks on elements behind modals
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks full game interaction testing and user experience

integration_issues.issue: Cannot properly test gem swapping and cascading due to modal overlay blocking clicks

passed_tests: HUD elements display (lives, coins, score, moves, target)
Shop modal opens with coin and IAP purchases
IAP packages load correctly with Stripe integration
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue: Modal overlays are intercepting pointer events and preventing clicks on elements behind them. This blocks full game interaction testing including gem swapping, cascading mechanics, and move validation. The modal-overlay class needs proper z-index management and click-through handling.
